message.content: @startuml title Please use '!option handwritten true' to enable handwritten actor SuperUser participant Browser participant Server database Database SuperUser ->> Browser : navigate to profile Browser->Server: loadAllUsers() activate Server Server->Database: fetch return deactivate Server Browser<-Browser: display note over SuperUser,Browser #DDF0FF#FFFFFF[Please use '!option handwritten true'\nto enable handwritten] SuperUser ->> Browser : enable/disable user Browser->Server: changeStatus(user) activate Server Server->Database: save return deactivate Server Browser <- Browser:display @enduml
